rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from BBID. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (5,000 x 35%). Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker. Live salaryAdjustments feed was unavailable for this build.
